'''zhabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yellowly|yellowly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yellowly|yellowly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhabate|zhabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhabatesher|zhabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhabatesherĂ«m|zhabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhabatero|zhabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhabateshĂ«|zhabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhabateshĂ«m|zhabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhabatero|gokizhabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhabateshĂ«|gokizhabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhabateshĂ«m|gokizhabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhabankerom|gozhabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhabankeshĂ«|gozhabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhabankeshĂ«m|gozhabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhabankeya|gozhabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhabaterom|zhabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhabatemu|zhabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhabateya|zhabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhabaterom|gokizhabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhabatemu|gokizhabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhabateya|gokizhabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhababate|zhababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhababatesher|zhababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhababatesherĂ«m|zhababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhababatero|zhababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhababateshĂ«|zhababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhababateshĂ«m|zhababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhababatero|gokizhababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhababateshĂ«|gokizhababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhababateshĂ«m|gokizhababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhababankerom|gozhababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhababankeshĂ«|gozhababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhababankeshĂ«m|gozhababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhababankeya|gozhababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhababaterom|zhababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhababatemu|zhababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhababateya|zhababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhababaterom|gokizhababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhababatemu|gokizhababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhababateya|gokizhababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠbĂŠte|zhĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠbĂŠtesher|zhĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠbĂŠtero|zhĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠbĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠbĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠbĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠbĂŠterom|zhĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠbĂŠtemu|zhĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠbĂŠteya|zhĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠbĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠbĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafbafte|zhafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafbaftesher|zhafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafbaftesherĂ«m|zhafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafbaftero|zhafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafbafteshĂ«|zhafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafbafteshĂ«m|zhafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafbaftero|gokizhafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafbafteshĂ«|gokizhafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafbafteshĂ«m|gokizhafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafbafnkerom|gozhafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafbafnkeshĂ«|gozhafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafbafnkeshĂ«m|gozhafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafbafnkeya|gozhafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafbafterom|zhafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafbaftemu|zhafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafbafteya|zhafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafbafterom|gokizhafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafbaftemu|gokizhafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafbafteya|gokizhafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
